multiple_integrations.note: 8+ integration points: Facets, FHIR endpoints, legacy DBs, EDI, fax, Autonomize AI, InterQual, MCG

data_pipeline_complexity.note: Multi-format ingestion (fax OCR, X12, FHIR) with NLP and clinical entity extraction

unfamiliar_tech_stack.note: Paul has direct experience with all recommended technologies

evolving_requirements.note: Assignment requirements are fixed; CMS-0057-F is published

critical_external_dependencies.note: Autonomize AI platform availability, FHIR endpoint availability, InterQual/MCG API availability

security_compliance.note: HIPAA, CMS-0057-F, CCPA — healthcare regulatory compliance

real_time_processing.note: Real-time eligibility checks, near-real-time PA determination

complex_business_logic.note: Clinical guidelines matching, multi-LOB rules, AI confidence scoring, human-in-the-loop routing

complexity_assessment.note: 7/10 complexity driven by integration count, compliance requirements, and clinical decision logic. 50% buffer recommended.

complexity_factors: 8+ external system integrations with varying protocols (FHIR R4, X12 278, JDBC, REST, SFTP)
HIPAA compliance across all data flows with PHI protection requirements
Multi-format document ingestion requiring OCR, NLP, and clinical entity extraction
AI-driven clinical decision-making with regulatory auditability requirements
Multi-tenant architecture for 20 LOBs with configuration isolation
CMS-0057-F compliance deadline (January 2027) requiring FHIR R4 PA API

risk_buffer.rationale: High complexity (7/10): 8+ integrations, HIPAA compliance, AI clinical decisions, multi-tenant architecture. Buffer covers: legacy DB connector surprises, FHIR endpoint compatibility issues, Textract OCR accuracy tuning, Autonomize AI integration unknowns.

infrastructure_monthly.pricing_notes: Estimates based on AWS published pricing as of March 2026. Textract: $1.50/page for forms, ~3.3M pages/month. Comprehend Medical: $0.01/unit, ~2.5M units/month. All other services based on published on-demand pricing. Actual costs will vary based on usage patterns and negotiated enterprise pricing.

third_party_monthly.autonomize_ai_platform: Separate commercial agreement — pricing not included in this estimate. Typical enterprise AI platform licensing ranges from $500K-$2M annually based on volume.
third_party_monthly.interqual_mcg_guidelines: Existing payer license — no incremental cost assumed

caveats: Autonomize AI platform licensing cost excluded — separate commercial negotiation
Clinical SME time provided by payer at no charge to project
Hourly rates reflect US market senior-level consulting rates
Infrastructure costs based on AWS published on-demand pricing — enterprise agreements typically 20-30% lower
12-week timeline is for Phase 1 (first LOB). Additional LOBs onboarded in Phase 2+
ROI based on 40% FTE reduction (180 of 450 FTEs at $65K fully loaded)

optimization_strategies.description: RDS PostgreSQL and MSK Kafka run 24/7 — 1-year reserved instances reduce cost by ~25%. Savings: ~$1,900/month.
Processed fax documents accessed rarely after 90 days. Intelligent-Tiering automatically moves to cheaper storage classes. Savings: ~$480/month.
Analytics warehouse active only during business hours and scheduled report runs. Auto-suspend eliminates idle compute. Savings: ~$1,500/month.
Monthly model fine-tuning jobs are non-urgent and can tolerate interruption. Spot instances reduce training compute cost by 70%. Savings: ~$1,400/month.
Start with 1 LOB (Commercial) in Phase 1. Multi-tenant architecture means LOB 2-20 onboarding adds minimal incremental infrastructure cost — primarily configuration work.

assumptions: 12-week timeline is fixed per assignment requirements — team size scales to fit
Autonomize AI platform licensing is a separate commercial agreement not included in this estimate
Clinical SMEs (2 FTEs at 50% allocation) provided by the payer at no project cost
All team members are US-based senior consultants at market rates
AWS infrastructure costs based on published on-demand pricing (enterprise pricing typically 20-30% lower)
Textract pricing: $1.50/page (forms) — actual volume depends on fax digitization rate
Comprehend Medical pricing: $0.01/character unit — volume based on 2.5M PA requests/month
ROI calculation: 180 FTE reduction × $65K fully loaded annual cost = $11.7M annual savings
No existing integration middleware to leverage — all integrations built from scratch
Payer has existing AWS account with VPC, IAM, and networking foundations
InterQual/MCG guidelines APIs are already licensed by the payer
